title: Schiedam 750
excerpt: Real-time generative video mapping on the Alevitisch Cultureel Centrum for Schiedam's 750th anniversary.
description: For Schiedam's 750th anniversary I created a custom video mapping on the Alevitisch Cultureel Centrum. Using the building's own geometry, I designed a real-time TouchDesigner patch to bring the facade to life — projected with a 30,000-lumen Epson laser projector and reflected in the water below.
credits: Produced and commissioned by LightUp Collective.
